esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-prometheusreceiver.otel-*
// raftlog_behind: entries slowest follower is behind; high = replication lag
// Adjust threshold (1000) based on workload; may indicate slow disks or network
| WHERE metrics.raftlog_behind IS NOT NULL AND metrics.raftlog_behind > 1000
| STATS behind = MAX(metrics.raftlog_behind)
  BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id, attributes.node_id, attributes.store
| SORT behind DESC
